requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — SLS / IEC 62133

summary.en: Sri Lanka's standards framework adopts international IEC standards as national SLS standards. For portable lithium cells and battery packs the relevant safety basis is IEC 62133-2 (as adopted into the SLS catalogue), covering abuse testing such as overcharge, short-circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse, and forced discharge. Where the product or its host appliance falls within an SLSI regulated/import-inspection scope, conformity to the applicable SLS/IEC standard and the SLS mark may be required as a condition of import and sale; otherwise IEC 62133-2 testing is still the expected commercial baseline that importers and SLSI assessors recognise. Exporters should obtain an IEC 62133-2 test report from an ISO/IEC 17025-accredited laboratory.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡的标准体系将国际IEC标准采纳为国家SLS标准。便携式锂电芯及电池组的相关安全依据为IEC 62133-2（已纳入SLS目录），涵盖过充、短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用及强制放电等滥用测试。当产品或其搭载电器属于SLSI受监管/进口检验范围时，符合适用SLS/IEC标准并取得SLS标志可能成为进口和销售的条件；即便不在范围内，IEC 62133-2测试仍是进口商及SLSI评估方所认可的商业基线。出口商应取得由ISO/IEC 17025认可实验室出具的IEC 62133-2测试报告。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡的標準體系將國際IEC標準採納為國家SLS標準。便攜式鋰電芯及電池組的相關安全依據為IEC 62133-2（已納入SLS目錄），涵蓋過充、短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用及強制放電等濫用測試。當產品或其搭載電器屬於SLSI受監管/進口檢驗範圍時，符合適用SLS/IEC標準並取得SLS標誌可能成為進口和銷售的條件；即便不在範圍內，IEC 62133-2測試仍是進口商及SLSI評估方所認可的商業基線。出口商應取得由ISO/IEC 17025認可實驗室出具的IEC 62133-2測試報告。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62133-2 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Part 2: Lithium systems (adopted as the applicable SLS national standard)
Sri Lanka Standards Institution Act No. 6 of 1984 (SLS mark and conformity assessment)

summary.en: China's primary safety standard for portable lithium battery packs is GB 31241-2022, technically derived from IEC 62133-2 but with national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria, supported by GB 18287 for mobile-phone batteries. A Chinese CNAS-accredited GB 31241 test report demonstrates domestic compliance but is not the same document an SLSI assessor or Sri Lankan importer expects; an IEC 62133-2 report (often issued under the IECEE CB Scheme) is the internationally portable evidence base.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022，技术上源自IEC 62133-2，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则上存在国家偏差，并以GB 18287作为手机电池补充。中国CNAS认可实验室出具的GB 31241测试报告证明国内符合性，但并非SLSI评估方或斯里兰卡进口商所期望的文件；IEC 62133-2报告（常通过IECEE CB体系出具）才是可国际通用的证据基础。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022，技術上源自IEC 62133-2，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則上存在國家偏差，並以GB 18287作為手機電池補充。中國CNAS認可實驗室出具的GB 31241測試報告證明國內符合性，但並非SLSI評估方或斯里蘭卡進口商所期望的文件；IEC 62133-2報告（常通過IECEE CB體系出具）才是可國際通用的證據基礎。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: Key gaps for the Sri Lanka route: (1) SLSI / Sri Lankan importers expect IEC 62133-2 evidence (ideally a CB test report and certificate) rather than a GB 31241 report, because Sri Lanka adopts IEC directly into SLS; (2) GB 31241 national deviations in crush and overcharge severity mean a GB report does not automatically map to IEC 62133-2 results; (3) where the product is in an SLSI regulated/import-inspection scope, the SLS mark and conformity assessment are additional steps with no Chinese-domestic equivalent. Exporters should secure IEC 62133-2 testing and confirm whether their specific item is within SLSI mandatory scope.
gap.zh: 斯里兰卡路径的主要差距：（1）SLSI/斯里兰卡进口商期望IEC 62133-2证据（最好是CB测试报告及证书），而非GB 31241报告，因为斯里兰卡直接将IEC采纳为SLS；（2）GB 31241在挤压和过充严苛程度上的国家偏差，意味着GB报告无法自动对应IEC 62133-2结果；（3）当产品属于SLSI受监管/进口检验范围时，SLS标志及合格评定属于额外步骤，中国国内无对应要求。出口商应取得IEC 62133-2测试，并确认其具体产品是否处于SLSI强制范围内。
gap.zht: 斯里蘭卡路徑的主要差距：（1）SLSI/斯里蘭卡進口商期望IEC 62133-2證據（最好是CB測試報告及證書），而非GB 31241報告，因為斯里蘭卡直接將IEC採納為SLS；（2）GB 31241在擠壓和過充嚴苛程度上的國家偏差，意味著GB報告無法自動對應IEC 62133-2結果；（3）當產品屬於SLSI受監管/進口檢驗範圍時，SLS標誌及合格評定屬於額外步驟，中國國內無對應要求。出口商應取得IEC 62133-2測試，並確認其具體產品是否處於SLSI強制範圍內。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — SLS conformity and the SLS mark may be mandatory where the product or host appliance is within an SLSI regulated/import-inspection scope; IEC 62133-2 testing is the expected baseline evidence in all cases
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under the SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

source.publisher: Sri Lanka Standards Institution (SLSI) — Product Certification

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Sri Lanka, prepare IEC 62133-2 cell-safety evidence (preferably a CB test report and certificate) because SLS standards adopt IEC directly. A Chinese GB 31241 report alone does not map cleanly to the IEC results expected by SLSI and importers. Confirm whether the specific battery or host product is within an SLSI mandatory/import-inspection scope requiring the SLS mark.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于斯里兰卡，应准备IEC 62133-2电芯安全证据（最好是CB测试报告及证书），因为SLS标准直接采纳IEC。仅凭中国GB 31241报告无法干净对应SLSI及进口商所期望的IEC结果。请确认具体电池或搭载产品是否处于SLSI强制/进口检验范围而需SLS标志。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於斯里蘭卡，應準備IEC 62133-2電芯安全證據（最好是CB測試報告及證書），因為SLS標準直接採納IEC。僅憑中國GB 31241報告無法乾淨對應SLSI及進口商所期望的IEC結果。請確認具體電池或搭載產品是否處於SLSI強制/進口檢驗範圍而需SLS標誌。
